text: The vision<S>2377</S> of Obadiah<S>5662</S>. Thus saith<S>559</S> the Lord<S>136</S> Jehovah<S>3069</S> concerning Edom<S>123</S>: We have heard<S>8085</S> tidings<S>8052</S> from Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and an ambassador<S>6735</S> is sent<S>7971</S> among the nations<S>1471</S>, saying<S>6965</S>, Arise ye<S>6965</S>, and let us rise up against her in battle<S>4421</S>.
Behold<S>5414</S>, I have made thee small<S>6996</S> among the nations<S>1471</S>: thou art greatly<S>3966</S> despised<S>959</S>.

The pride<S>2087</S> of thy heart<S>3820</S> hath deceived<S>5377</S> thee<S>7931</S>, O thou that dwellest in the clefts<S>2288</S> of the rock<S>5553</S>, whose habitation<S>3427</S> is high<S>4791</S>; that saith<S>559</S> in his heart<S>3820</S>, Who shall bring me down<S>3381</S> to the ground<S>776</S>?

Though thou mount on high<S>1361</S> as the eagle<S>5404</S>, and though thy nest<S>7064</S> be set<S>7760</S> among the stars<S>3556</S>, I will bring thee down<S>3381</S> from thence<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

If thieves<S>1590</S> came<S>935</S> to thee<S>7703</S>, if robbers by night<S>3915</S> (how art thou cut off<S>1820</S>!), would they not steal<S>1589</S> only till they had enough<S>1767</S>? if grape-gatherers<S>1219</S> came<S>935</S> to thee<S>7604</S>, would they not leave some gleaning grapes<S>5955</S>?
How are the things of Esau<S>6215</S> searched<S>2664</S>! how are his hidden<S>4710</S> treasures sought out<S>2664</S>!

All the men<S>582</S> of thy confederacy<S>1285</S> have brought<S>7971</S> thee on thy way<S>1366</S>, even to the border: the men<S>582</S> that were at peace<S>7965</S> with thee have deceived<S>5377</S> thee<S>3201</S>, and prevailed against thee<S>3899</S>; they that eat thy bread lay<S>7760</S> a snare<S>4204</S> under thee<S>8394</S>: there is no understanding in him.

Shall I not in that day<S>3117</S>, saith<S>5002</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, destroy<S>6</S> the wise<S>2450</S> men out of Edom<S>123</S>, and understanding<S>8394</S> out of the mount<S>2022</S> of Esau<S>6215</S>?

And thy mighty<S>1368</S> men<S>8487</S>, O Teman, shall be dismayed<S>2865</S>, to the end that every one<S>376</S> may be cut off<S>3772</S> from the mount<S>2022</S> of Esau<S>6215</S> by slaughter<S>6993</S>.
For the violence<S>2555</S> done to thy brother<S>251</S> Jacob<S>3290</S>, shame<S>955</S> shall cover<S>3680</S> thee<S>3772</S>, and thou shalt be cut off for ever<S>5769</S>.

In the day<S>3117</S> that thou stoodest<S>5975</S> on the other side<S>3117</S>, in the day that strangers<S>2114</S> carried<S>7617</S> away his substance<S>2428</S>, and foreigners<S>5237</S> entered<S>935</S> into his gates<S>8179</S>, and cast<S>3032</S> lots<S>1486</S> upon Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, even thou wast as one of them<S>259</S>.

But look<S>7200</S> not thou on the day<S>3117</S> of thy brother<S>251</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of his disaster<S>5235</S>, and rejoice<S>8055</S> not over the children<S>1121</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of their destruction<S>6</S>; neither speak<S>6310</S> proudly<S>1431</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of distress<S>6869</S>.

Enter<S>935</S> not into the gate<S>8179</S> of my people<S>5971</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of their calamity<S>343</S>; yea<S>7200</S>, look not thou on their affliction<S>7451</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of their calamity<S>343</S>, neither lay<S>7971</S> ye hands on their substance<S>2428</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of their calamity<S>343</S>.

And stand<S>5975</S> thou not in the crossway<S>6563</S>, to cut off<S>3772</S> those of his that escape<S>6412</S>; and deliver not up<S>5462</S> those of his that remain<S>8300</S> in the day<S>3117</S> of distress<S>6869</S>.

For the day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is near<S>7138</S> upon all the nations<S>1471</S>: as thou hast done<S>6213</S>, it shall be done<S>6213</S> unto thee<S>1576</S>; thy dealing shall return<S>7725</S> upon thine own head<S>7218</S>.

For as ye have drunk<S>8354</S> upon my holy<S>6944</S> mountain<S>2022</S>, so shall all the nations<S>1471</S> drink<S>8354</S> continually<S>8548</S>; yea<S>8354</S>, they shall drink, and swallow down<S>3886</S>, and shall be as though they had not been<S>3808</S>.

But in mount<S>2022</S> Zion<S>6726</S> there shall be those that escape<S>6413</S>, and it shall be holy<S>6944</S>; and the house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> shall possess<S>3423</S> their possessions<S>4180</S>.

And the house<S>1004</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S> shall be a fire<S>784</S>, and the house<S>1004</S> of Joseph<S>3130</S> a flame<S>3852</S>, and the house<S>1004</S> of Esau<S>6215</S> for stubble<S>7179</S>, and they shall burn<S>1814</S> among them<S>398</S>, and devour them<S>8300</S>; and there shall not be any remaining to the house<S>1004</S> of Esau<S>6215</S>; for Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath spoken it<S>1696</S>.

And they of the South<S>5045</S> shall possess<S>3423</S> the mount<S>2022</S> of Esau<S>6215</S>, and they of the lowland<S>8219</S> the Philistines<S>6430</S>; and they shall possess<S>3423</S> the field<S>7704</S> of Ephraim<S>669</S>, and the field<S>7704</S> of Samaria<S>8111</S>; and Benjamin<S>1144</S> shall possess Gilead<S>1568</S>.

And the captives<S>1546</S> of this host<S>2426</S> of the children<S>1121</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, that are among the Canaanites<S>3669</S>, shall possess even unto Zarephath<S>6886</S>; and the captives<S>1546</S> of Jerusalem<S>3389</S>, that are in Sepharad<S>5614</S>, shall possess<S>3423</S> the cities<S>5892</S> of the South<S>5045</S>.

And saviours<S>3467</S> shall come up<S>5927</S> on mount<S>2022</S> Zion<S>6726</S> to judge<S>8199</S> the mount<S>2022</S> of Esau<S>6215</S>; and the kingdom<S>4410</S> shall be Jehovah<S>3068</S>'s.
